    comp: state migrated: childA → childB
<{%reset%}>  my:module:Comp: (same)
<{%reset%}>    [id=1]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::my:module:Comp::comp]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    <{%reset%}>  pkgA:m:typA: (same)
<{%reset%}>        [id=3]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>        [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::my:module:Comp$pkgA:m:typA::childB]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 13%}><{%bold%}>Resources:<{%reset%}>
    2 unchanged

<{%fg 13%}><{%bold%}>Duration:<{%reset%}> 1s
